vehicle.label: 6-DOF Industrial Arm
vehicle.desc: 6-DOF serial industrial robot arm, 5kg payload, 600mm reach

parts.label: Base Joint (J1)
parts.spec: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409

parts.label: Shoulder Joint (J2)
parts.spec: Shoulder pitch joint J2, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 80Nm, cable routing through center bore

parts.label: Upper Arm (Link 2-3)
parts.spec: Upper arm link, 300mm length, hollow tube with cable conduit, lightweight Al 7075

parts.label: Elbow Joint (J3)
parts.spec: Elbow pitch joint J3, +-150deg, cycloidal reducer, 50Nm, encoder dual-stack

parts.label: Forearm + Wrist (J4)
parts.spec: Forearm with wrist roll J4, 250mm length, +-360deg continuous, slip ring for power/signal

parts.label: Wrist Pitch (J5)
parts.spec: Wrist pitch joint J5, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 20Nm, compact form factor

parts.label: Wrist Roll (J6)

parts.spec: Tool changer master plate at J6 end, pneumatic locking, 4 utility ports

parts.label: Cable Management Spine
parts.spec: External cable carrier from base to wrist, drag chain or spiral, signal + power + pneumatic

parts.label: Replaceable Motor Module Set
parts.spec: Actuation_motors closure module: replaceable motor_module cartridges for J1-J6, fastener_access, coupling_dummy, insert/washer preload pads, torque_Nm intent labels

parts.label: Encoder Cover + Sensing Set
parts.spec: Sensing_encoders closure module: encoder_pocket and encoder_cover at each joint, index marks, cable exit strain relief, inspection labels

parts.label: Drive Electronics Bay
parts.spec: Drive_electronics bay with driver_bay, power_channel, signal_channel, ground_point, service cover, connector keying, thermal inspection window

requirements: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409
Vehicle context: 6-DOF serial industrial robot arm, 5kg payload, 600mm reach
Application variant: welding cell deployment, heat-shielded links, spark-resistant cable routing
Suggested material: Al 7075 + steel + composite, process: CNC + LPBF

risk.desc: Potential thermal stress on harmonic drive mount due to high heat dissipation
risk.mit: Implement thermal management solutions such as heat sinks or cooling channels

risk.desc: Leveling adjustment screws may loosen over time due to vibration
risk.mit: Use locking nuts or adhesive on leveling adjustment screws

risk.desc: Cable entry grommet may not provide sufficient strain relief
risk.mit: Add strain relief geometry such as clamps or tie points

risk.desc: Mounting flange may not provide sufficient structural integrity
risk.mit: Increase wall thickness or add reinforcing ribs

risk.desc: Potential misalignment during assembly due to lack of clear alignment features
risk.mit: Add alignment pins or datum features

risk.desc: Potential thermal cycling issues due to welding cell deployment.
risk.mit: Implement thermal management solutions such as heat shields and cooling systems.

risk.desc: Cable routing through center bore may cause strain relief issues.
risk.mit: Ensure proper strain relief and slack loops for cables crossing joints.

risk.desc: High cycle life may lead to wear and tear on critical joints.
risk.mit: Regular maintenance and inspection of joints to ensure longevity.

risk.desc: Insufficient clearance in moving joints can cause binding.
risk.mit: Ensure all moving joints have appropriate clearances.

risk.desc: Potential alignment issues due to complex assembly sequence.
risk.mit: Develop detailed assembly sequences and alignment tools.

risk.mit: Increase rib thickness or add additional ribs.

verify.value: Adjacent interfaces are named with exact neighboring subsystem labels and connection_type + DOF + clearance_mm + required_feature.
verify.rule: Name exact neighboring subsystem labels when they mate, and choose connection_type + DOF + clearance_mm + required_feature so the neighbor can declare the same joint family back.

verify.value: Visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence for critical joints and torque_Nm or preload intent.

verify.rule: verify must include a boundary_conditions object: fixture_points [{at:[x,y,z], type:fixed|pinned|roller}], thermal_zones [{at:[x,y,z], W_or_degC:number, role:source|sink}], pressure_faces [{face:string, Pa:number}] for downstream CFD/FEA.

risk.desc: Potential thermal management issues with the cycloidal reducer due to high torque and limited heat dissipation area.
risk.mit: Implement additional cooling fins or a heat sink on the reducer dummy feature.

risk.desc: Cable routing may be compromised if the harness/cable routing path is not properly designed to avoid pinch points.
risk.mit: Ensure the harness/cable routing path is designed with slack loops and strain relief at both ends.

risk.desc: Service access may be limited if the service access panel is not adequately sized or positioned.
risk.mit: Increase the size of the service access panel to ensure easy access to internal components.

risk.desc: Potential misalignment during assembly if the primary locating faces are not clearly defined or visible.
risk.mit: Ensure all primary locating faces are clearly visible and labeled in the design.

risk.desc: Risk of fastener failure due to inadequate preload or locking evidence.
risk.mit: Verify and document the preload or locking evidence for all critical joints.

risk.desc: Potential for grounding issues if grounding scheme is not properly implemented.
risk.mit: Ensure a clear grounding scheme is documented and implemented.

risk.desc: Risk of assembly errors due to lack of detailed assembly instructions.
risk.mit: Develop detailed assembly instructions including tooling and torque specifications.

physics_paths.description: Thermal path from heat sink to ambient air for cooling.
Electrical power distribution from power_channel to driver_bay and grounding.
Signal path from signal_channel to driver_bay and control_hub.
Access path for maintenance and diagnostics through service_cover.

integration_opportunities.description: Option to integrate additional sensors on the driver_bay.
Option to enhance power routing within the power_channel.
Option to improve signal isolation within the signal_channel.

verification_focus.description: Ensure driver_bay provides adequate space and cooling for electronics.
Verify driver_bay_shell can withstand environmental conditions.
Check power_channel for correct electrical isolation and routing.
